title: Yoshimasa Tsuruoka
text: Home * People * Yoshimasa Tsuruoka Yoshimasa Tsuruoka [1] Yoshimasa Tsuruoka , a Japanese computer scientist, Shogi programmer and associate professor at University of Tokyo and before at School of Information Science [2] , Japan Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (JAIST) . His research topics include natural language processing , text mining from biomedical literature, artificial intelligence in games , and deep learning . Yoshimasa Tsuruoka is co-author of the Shogi engine Gekisashi , Gold medal winner of the 15th Computer Olympiad, Shogi in Kanazawa .
